SEARCH
Package dev.quassel.ga.core

Interface SearchDomain<C>

Type Parameters:
C - candidate type of the concrete domain
All Known Implementing Classes:
PuzzleDomain
public interface SearchDomain<C>
Domain contract for the generic search engine.

The GA core knows nothing about a concrete problem. A domain provides candidate creation, variation, evaluation and a stable fingerprint for diversity and duplicate detection.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default C
    crossover(C left, C right, RandomGenerator rng)
    Combines two parents into a child candidate.
    String

    Returns a human-readable description of a candidate.
    EvaluationResult

    Evaluates a candidate and returns a structured result.
    default String
    fingerprint(C candidate)
    Returns a stable fingerprint used for duplicate detection and diversity estimates.
    C
    mutate(C candidate, RandomGenerator rng)
    Produces a mutated candidate from an existing one.
    C
    randomCandidate(RandomGenerator rng)
    Creates a fresh random candidate.

  • Method Details

    • randomCandidate

      C randomCandidate(RandomGenerator rng)
      Creates a fresh random candidate.
      Parameters:
      rng - random source controlled by the GA
      Returns:
      a newly created candidate

    • mutate

      C mutate(C candidate, RandomGenerator rng)
      Produces a mutated candidate from an existing one.
      Parameters:
      candidate - source candidate
      rng - random source controlled by the GA
      Returns:
      mutated candidate

    • crossover

      default C crossover(C left, C right, RandomGenerator rng)
      Combines two parents into a child candidate.

      The default implementation simply returns one of the parents.

      Parameters:
      left - first parent
      right - second parent
      rng - random source controlled by the GA
      Returns:
      child candidate

    • evaluate

      EvaluationResult evaluate(C candidate)
      Evaluates a candidate and returns a structured result.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to evaluate
      Returns:
      structured evaluation

    • describe

      String describe(C candidate)
      Returns a human-readable description of a candidate.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to describe
      Returns:
      textual description

    • fingerprint

      default String fingerprint(C candidate)
      Returns a stable fingerprint used for duplicate detection and diversity estimates.

      Implementations should prefer a canonical problem-specific identity instead of a verbose textual description whenever possible.

      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to fingerprint
      Returns:
      stable identity string for duplicate detection
